properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every time I try to make it on my own Every time I try to stand, I start to fall And all those lonely roads that I have traveled on There was Jesus

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the life I built came crashing to the ground When the friends I had were nowhere to be found I couldn't see it then but I can see it now There was Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the waiting, in the searching In the healing, in the hurting Like a blessing buried in the broken pieces Every minute, every moment Where I've been or where I'm going Even when I didn't know it Or couldn't see it There was Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For this man who needs amazing kind of grace (mm-hmm) For forgiveness and a price I couldn't pay (mm-hmm, mm-hmm) I'm not perfect so I thank God every day There was Jesus There was Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: On the mountains, in the valleys There was Jesus In the shadows, of the alleys There was Jesus In the fire, in the flood There was Jesus Always is and always was, oh No, I never walk alone Never walk alone You're always there

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There was Jesus There was Jesus There was Jesus
